description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and clean lines. The sofa features a uniform, light gray fabric upholstery that covers both the frame and the loose cushions. It has wide, straight armrests that are the same height as the backrest, creating a continuous rectangular profile. The seating area consists of two main seat cushions and five loose back cushions, all of which are plush and generously filled for comfort. The sofa sits low to the ground on small, barely visible legs, giving it a grounded and contemporary appearance. Its overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or patterns, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or upscale public spaces.
description: A large, modern light gray sectional sofa with wide, straight armrests and plush loose cushions, featuring a minimalist and boxy design. The upholstery is solid and smooth, and the sofa sits low on small, unobtrusive legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two main seat cushions, five loose back cushions, and both wide armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sofa, the straight armrest, and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned backrest and the tops of the back cushions peeking above the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the straight armrest and the arrangement of the cushions from the other end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and five loose, uniform back cushions arranged in a single row; all cushions are separate and not attached to the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Small, recessed legs barely visible at the corners, likely made of dark-colored metal or plastic, giving a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with five loose back cushions resting against it; no tufting or segmentation visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
